description: Tech tier ids used by the live Inpinity City crafting and weapon system.

values.name: Primitive
values.notes: Confirmed live via Iron Sword and early components.

values.name: Refined
values.notes: Confirmed live via Crystal Bow and Crystal Core.

values.notes: Confirmed live via Stabilizer and Resonance Grip.

values.name: High-Tech
